description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a collared, button-up shirt with long sleeves and a pair of straight-cut trousers. The shirt features a two-tone design, with one side lighter and the other darker, and is worn untucked. The figure has a naturalistic build, with defined facial features, short hair, and is wearing closed-toe shoes. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the hands are relaxed. The overall appearance suggests a casual or semi-casual urban pedestrian, suitable for city streets or sidewalks. The clothing and posture indicate a typical adult male encountered in everyday urban environments.
description: An adult male in a two-tone collared shirt and trousers, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has short hair and wears closed-toe shoes, presenting a casual urban pedestrian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two-tone collared shirt, facial features, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the shirt's sleeve, and the straight-cut trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, trousers, and the back of the head with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm, and the side seam of the trousers.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve collared button-up shirt and straight-cut trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
